title: Distant Horizons Optimized
description: An Upgrade for Distant Horizons, while optimizing it!
body:
An upgrade for the Distant Horizons mod! With a **lot of optimization** and **_unreal looking shaders_**! It is made to work on low end pcs and higher end pcs withouth turning your game into a slide show!

**_Dont use DH! Use this!_**

My other projects:

FPV Elytra : https://modrinth.com/modpack/fpv-elytra

Simple Vanilla + : https://modrinth.com/modpack/simple-vanilla-+

Simply Superior : https://modrinth.com/modpack/simply-superior
